steps.title: Identify the naming pattern
steps.content: The key signal is in note 3: “Many of the 500 or so that exist today are named for a previous owner.” This establishes how Stradivarius violins get their names—they're named after previous owners.

steps.title: Apply the naming pattern to the specific case
steps.content: Choice D directly uses this pattern to explain the Jules Falk Stradivarius: it was named after its former owner, Jules Falk. A only identifies Jules Falk without explaining the naming mechanism, B misstates the survival numbers and is irrelevant, and C discusses the maker and reputation rather than the naming reason. This matches choice D — D is correct.
